response.justification: The candidate brings 17+ years of genuine engineering breadth across embedded, web, infrastructure, and mobile domains, and their current role includes early-stage AI agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work. However, the role demands a Director-level individual contributor who can independently advise strategic customers and partners on AI strategy, define future cloud product directions, and lead with recognized AI expertise. The candidate's AI experience is almost entirely limited to one year in the current role, with no prior demonstrated AI product leadership, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of executive-level advisory or strategic thought leadership engagement. The seniority gap between a Staff/Senior engineer and a Principal/Director-level strategic IC is substantial and not bridged by the resume's demonstrated trajectory.
strengths: 17+ years of sustained engineering practice across diverse domains including high-throughput infrastructure (millions of req/s at Sociomantic), full-stack product work, and embedded/robotics, demonstrating genuine technical depth

Active contribution to AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators in current role, plus founder experience building and operating an open-source geospatial platform — shows builder mindset and entrepreneurial execution
Public knowledge-sharing through conference talks (FOSS4G) and multi-day workshops on web internals and TDD — indicates some capacity to inspire and teach technical audiences
concerns: AI/ML expertise is less than 18 months old with no prior record of building AI-powered products or platforms at scale — far below the 'recognized expertise with demonstrated products' bar the role requires
No evidence of strategic customer or partner advisory engagements, executive-level technical consulting, or influencing product roadmaps at a business-unit or organization level

Career trajectory has remained at Staff/Senior individual contributor; the role is explicitly Director-level IC, a seniority jump that would require demonstrated scope, influence, and organizational impact not visible in this resume
